author: WSvX
content:
## Session 5 (2026-04-25): Lint Review + Polish

### Actions
- Reviewed lint-results-fossDebug.html: 14 warnings, 0 errors
- Identified 1 feature-introduced issue (ContentDescription on widget header ImageViews)
- Fixed: ImageView→ImageButton with contentDescription for all 3 widget header actions
- Refactored: deprecated onBackPressed → onBackPressedCompat in WidgetListConfigureActivity
- Fixed: Map<Long,Int> → LongSparseArray<Int> in EventsHelper
- Fixed: hardcoded hex → @color reference in debug launcher background
- 3 commits: 115de4c88, 29b387c68, 5060be6a4 (amended to a9374e49d)
- Closed crosslink #11 (Room schema committed)

### Current Status
- Build: PASSING (lint 0 errors, 14 warnings all pre-existing or expected MissingTranslation)
- Lint: 0 feature-introduced issues
- Detekt: PASSING (resolved in dea77fc0b)
- All 12 feature files committed across 7 commits

### Remaining
- Manual testing per design doc section 5.5
- Final verification: migration backward compat on device
- Push to remote for PR
